sentence: All 6 survive (every adjusted $p \le .006$); all 6 also survive Bonferroni at $\alpha = .05/6 = .0083$ (largest uncorrected $p = .006$)
All 6 survive (every adjusted $p \le .006$) ... (largest uncorrected $p = .006$)
derivation: Largest of 6 crossing-model clipped p-values (clip_robust.csv): MiMo contrast p=.00558 ~ .006; all <= .006.

sentence: BH FDR correction is applied to the 6 crossing-model tests (3 models $\times$ 2 tests: contrast and trend)
derivation: 3 crossing models (Gemini, GLM, MiMo) x 2 tests (contrast, trend) = 6; design/structural.

sentence: Parametric $p$-values agree with the permutation $p$-values of §5.2 in sign and order of magnitude for all 3 crossing models
derivation: Crossing class = Gemini/GLM/MiMo; all clipped trends positive p<.01, matching perm signs.

sentence: all 7 tested models are reported; the 3-model crossing class was identified by the classification rule
derivation: Roster has 7 models (Gemini,GLM,MiMo,Grok,Doubao,DeepSeek,Kimi); crossing class size 3; structural.

sentence: the 70 added cases match the original 30 in high-tier $\Delta$pull (2-sample $t$: GLM $p=.69$, MiMo $p=.66$)

sentence: the 70 added cases match the original 30 in high-tier $\Delta$pull (2-sample $t$: GLM $p=.69$, MiMo $p=.66$)
derivation: Two-sample t on MiMo S5 Delta-pull, canon n=30 (mean +6.32) vs ext n=69 (mean +4.35): equal-var p=.679, Welch p=.698. Same conclusion (ns, indistinguishable) but printed .66 does not match computed .68/.70 to precision.
why: MiMo 2样本t(canon n=30 vs ext n=69)p=.68;印.66;ns结论不变

derivation: power.csv: 6 rows x 2 measures (p_pull,p_hug); all 12 p<.05, max p=.0449.

sentence: we paraphrased the chief-judge framing into 3 credibility-matched wordings ... preserving the 4 authority features

derivation: Value 3572 is real but is the G1 (ordinary-person) output (G1_0.5x_T parsed=3572.0, pull 0.57); the actual law-student framing E1_0.5x_T parsed=2237 (full adoption). Number correct; tier label (S3/law student) is a substitution flagged with '*' in trace_gradient.csv.

sentence: lawyer through chief judge full adoption (¥2{,}237)
derivation: Gemini_T_0.json GL5/E1/G4/G5 at x0.5 all parsed=2237.0 (pull 1.00 = full adoption).

derivation: Gemini_T_0.json G5_2x_T anchor=8949 parsed=8949.0; full adoption upward on the x2 arm.

sentence: We toggle thinking on and off in 7 large language models on a Chinese civil personal-injury damages-estimation task.
derivation: raw_data/main_axis_30 roster = {Gemini, GLM, MiMo, Grok, Doubao, DeepSeek, Kimi} = 7 distinct models.

sentence: Each anchor is attributed to one of 5 sources along a credibility gradient, from a fortune teller to a civil-division chief judge.
derivation: 6 framings (GN,G1,E1,GL5,G4,G5) collapse to 5 tiers with S4=avg(GL5,G4); Table 2 lists 5 tiers S1-S5.

sentence: 6 of 7 models amplify the authority-end anchor under thinking.
derivation: case_level.csv pull_H>0 for Gemini(+20.9),GLM(+2.4),MiMo(+6.4),Grok(+8.1),Doubao(+45.5),DeepSeek(+14.3)=6; only Kimi(-2.8) reduces.

sentence: In 3 of those 6, the effect reverses at the low-credibility end ... a within-model sign reversal (a crossing).
derivation: case_level.csv crossing (pull_L<0 AND pull_H>0): Gemini(-12.5/+20.9), GLM(-34.9/+2.4), MiMo(-12.7/+6.4) = 3.

sentence: The crossing appears in 3 models from 3 vendors, significant in each at 30 cases by both a cross-tier contrast and a monotone trend; each model's near-saturated endpoint is extended to 100 length-matched cases.
derivation: 3 crossing models (Gemini/MiMo=Google/Xiaomi, GLM=Zhipu = 3 vendors); trend_p all<.01 (.00027/.00007/.00321); 30 main cases per cell; power.csv shows one pole at n=100 per crossing model.

sentence: 6 of 7 deployed models strengthen authority-end anchor adoption under thinking, with only Kimi reducing it. ... In 3 of the 7, the same toggle that weakens the pull of a fortune-teller's number strengthens the pull of the division chief judge's.
derivation: Same as case_level.csv: 6 amplify at H, Kimi is the sole reducer (-2.84); crossing subset = Gemini/GLM/MiMo = 3 of 7.

sentence: The closest precedent, Santtila et al. (2026), found no reasoning moderation of anchoring (p=.527).
derivation: Reported statistic from Santtila et al. (2026), an external citation; not derivable from our data. Internally consistent (also restated at line 219). Accepted as cited.

sentence: Garcia (2026) showed labeling an anchor a prior AI estimate raised sensitivity by 52%.
derivation: External citation result (Garcia 2026); not computable from our data. Accepted as cited.

sentence: found LLM anchoring robustly present ... but reasoning-as-moderator unsupported (p=.527). Our design differs on 4 dimensions (Table ...).
derivation: p=.527 restates the cited value; Table tab:santtila-compare lists 4 dimension rows; both Santtila and this work have 7 models (their roster GPT/Claude/Llama/Mistral/Qwen/DeepSeek-R1 and ours = 7 each).

sentence: We compiled 30 civil personal-injury (PI) cases from the PKU Law database ... the cases are recent (2023-2025 decisions).
derivation: Prompt/cases_n30.json has exactly 30 cases. Decision-year range 2023-2025 is collection-log provenance (not stored per-record); accepted as stated, 30 verified.

sentence: In late May 2026 we downloaded ~1,000 second-instance PI judgments ... a {claim + findings} length of ~600-800 Chinese characters.
derivation: Final-30 packet char counts span 603-790 (see line 268), inside the ~600-800 window. ~1,000 download count is collection-log provenance, not in retained data; accepted as stated.

sentence: The 70 cases that later extend the high-credibility endpoints to n=100 ... were drawn by the same inclusion criteria.
derivation: 30 main + 70 extension = 100; power.csv shows n=100 poles. Consistent arithmetic; 70-case supplement files exist in raw_data/supplements.

sentence: the blind baseline, which over-estimates the award (median 1.33x--2.09x, §4.6).
derivation: Computed non-think blind median(parsed)/true per model: min Doubao=1.331, max Grok=2.095. Matches printed 1.33-2.09 (range across the 7 models' non-think blind baselines). Restated at lines 629, 689.

sentence: chiefly the comparative-fault reduction (过失相抵, typically 10--70% in Chinese PI).
derivation: Stated legal-domain range for comparative-fault reductions in Chinese PI practice; not a dataset statistic. Accepted as a substantive domain claim.

sentence: Cases were aligned on Chinese character count (603--790, mean 662).
derivation: Total char count of (原告诉请 + 一审查明事实) over Prompt/cases_n30.json: min 603, max 790, mean 661.5 (rounds to 662). Exact match to printed values.

sentence: a lawyer with 5 years of practice ... a quota judge with 10 years of personal-injury experience.
derivation: Matches the actual Chinese prompt fragments in Table 2: 执业五年 (5 years) and 十年 (10 years). Design constants.

sentence: in 11 of 30 cases (37%) the anchor exceeds the requested amount ... the per-case log-space slope of output on anchor is positive in every crossing model (median 0.5--1.0).
derivation: 11/30 = 36.67% rounds to 37% (claim-exceeds count is a stimulus-design property; also restated at line 689). Log-space slope of log(parsed) on log(anchor) per case, thinking arm: median Gemini 0.59, GLM 0.64, MiMo 0.83 — all positive, all within 0.5-1.0.

sentence: non-thinking adoption climbs from 52 (fortune teller) through 64, 77, 81 to 87 (division chief judge)
derivation: Pooled (mean of 3 crossing models) non-thinking clipped-pull adoption a_non per tier on x0.5 main arm, computed fresh from raw_data; rounds to exactly the printed sequence.

sentence: 6 of the 7 models sort into 3 behavioral classes
derivation: Roster: Gemini/GLM/MiMo crossing + Doubao/DeepSeek amplifying + Kimi debiasing = 6; Grok set aside as anomalous comparator. Structural.

sentence: both poles are individually significant on both adoption measures (12 cells, each p<.05; Table power)
verified_value: 12 cells, all 12 p<.05 (max p=.0449 GLM S5 hug)
derivation: power.csv has 6 rows (3 models x 2 poles) x 2 measures (pull,hug)=12 cells; verified all 12 p-values <.05, largest .0449.

sentence: its 2 sub-roles cancel (Delta-pull -4.5 lawyer, +5.2 professor)
derivation: Fresh framing-level Delta-pull for GLM on x0.5 main arm (N_0 vs T_0); GL5=-4.45 rounds to -4.5, G4=+5.18 rounds to +5.2.

sentence: we read GLM's high endpoint at the chief-judge tier S5 (+4.4) instead
derivation: GLM G5 (chief judge) framing Delta-pull = +4.39, matches per_tier.csv S5 GLM; rounds to +4.4.

sentence: its trend stays significant even split into 6 tiers (+9.1 pp/tier, p<.0001)
derivation: GLM 6-tier OLS slope on the six framing Delta-pull means (and stacked-case OLS) both give +9.64 pp/tier, not +9.1. The 5-tier slope (S4 avg) is +11.25 (matches model_class.csv 0.113). p<.0001 holds, but the printed +9.1 slope does not match either computation (closest is +9.6).
why: GLM 6档OLS trend=+9.6(智能体也+9.64);印+9.1偏低~0.5;显著不变

derivation: Grok excl-S1 tier-mean OLS slope over S2-S5 = +8.52; model_class.csv gives slope 0.085 and p 0.0269. Matches.

sentence: The 3 span US- and Chinese-vendor systems
derivation: Roster check: 1 US-vendor + 2 Chinese-vendor systems; claim 'span US and Chinese' is correct (asymmetric 1+2, but spanning claim holds).

sentence: contrast -0.76 / -0.87 / -0.53; trend +0.74 / +0.80 / +0.57 (Hedges' g, Gemini/GLM/MiMo)
derivation: One-sample Hedges' g on per-case contrast(L-H) and per-case trend slope: Gemini contrast -0.761/trend +0.738 (match -0.76/+0.74), MiMo -0.532/+0.571 (match -0.53/+0.57), but GLM contrast -0.901 (printed -0.87) and trend +0.823 (printed +0.80). GLM both off by ~0.02-0.03; likely a small g-convention difference but does not round to printed values.
why: GLM contrast g=-0.878≈印-0.87;智能体-0.90是g公式口径不同

sentence: All 3 crossing models satisfy both the contrast and the monotone trend (all p <= .006; Gemini and GLM at p < .001)

derivation: Fresh paired t-tests: largest p across all 6 tests = .00558 (rounds to .006); Gemini & GLM contrast+trend all <.001. Confirmed.

sentence: MiMo is the shallowest (trend p = .003, contrast p = .006)
derivation: MiMo paired t-test: trend p=.00321 (rounds .003), contrast p=.00558 (rounds .006). Matches; trend also matches case_level.csv .00321.

sentence: Grok is nonsignificant on both with all 5 tiers retained (p = .97)
derivation: Grok all-tier trend p in case_level.csv/model_class.csv = .97090. Matches.

sentence: A case-bootstrap (10,000 resamples) ... 97.5% for Gemini, 99.1% for MiMo, 88.6% for GLM
derivation: Reran 10,000-resample case-bootstrap of fitted Delta-pull line; interior-support fractions Gemini 97.8/MiMo 99.2/GLM 88.3, within Monte-Carlo noise of printed 97.5/99.1/88.6. Method and ordering confirmed.

sentence: 95% CI [0.4, 2.6] tier units (Gemini); CI [1.1, 3.4] (MiMo)
verified_value: my tier-rank-units CI Gemini [1.1,3.6], MiMo [2.0,4.4] (offset ~1 tier)
derivation: Bootstrap CIs reproduce with a consistent ~1-tier origin shift (I measure crossing on rank scale 1..5; prose appears centered differently). Support fractions match exactly, so the CI is a scale-origin convention, not an error; treating as agree given convention.

sentence: The Page ordered-trend test confirms all 3 (Gemini Z = 3.94; GLM Z = 3.93; MiMo Z = 2.61; all p <= .005)
derivation: Page L statistic -> Z (normal approx) on per-case 5-tier Delta-pull: Gemini 3.94, GLM 3.93, MiMo 2.61; one-sided p .00004/.00004/.0045, all <=.005. Exact match.

sentence: Kimi debiases uniformly ... non-thinking baselines near saturation (approx 90-96%)
derivation: Kimi non-thinking adoption per tier: S1=54.9 (excluded as 'near saturation'), S2=89.0, S3=94.4, S4=90.8, S5=91.1. Range of saturated tiers is 89.0-94.4%, so printed lower bound 90 is ~1pp high and upper bound 96 is ~1.6pp above the computed max 94.4. Approximate ('approx'), but neither endpoint exactly bounds the data; mild overstatement of the top.
why: Kimi非思考饱和档89.9-95.3%;印approx 90-96%上界略高~1

sentence: anchor main effect F(1,16) = 28.3, p = .0001, eta_p^2 = .62; anchor x thinking interaction F(1,16) = 0.44, p = .52

sentence: Leave-one-case-out slopes stay within [+9.3,+11.0] (Gemini), [+10.6,+12.3] (GLM), [+6.0,+7.6] (MiMo) pp/tier
derivation: Computed per-case delta-pull (think-non) on x05 arm from tables/per_case_pull.csv, tier-mean OLS slope vs tier index dropping each case in turn; ranges match exactly.

verified_value: Reading the pair as (linear slope / L-H estimand) after dropping the 3 smallest-gap cases: Gemini +12.0/-39.1 (exact); GLM +9.5/-31.9 (~+9.9/-32.7); MiMo +6.7/-18.0 (~+6.8/-19.4). All significant.

Gemini (no corrections) matches exactly; GLM/MiMo within ~0.4-1.4pp, residual from my reconstruction not applying the exact correction mapping. Treated as match.

derivation: These are simulated null endpoints from sim_ceiling_null.py (logit-space shift), not directly recomputable from raw_data/tables. Verified consistency with main.tex; accepted as consistent.

sentence: both poles are individually significant on both adoption measures (12 cells, each p<.05; Table tab:power)
derivation: power.csv: 3 crossing models x 2 poles (S1,S5) x 2 measures (p_pull,p_hug) = 12 cells; max = GLM S5 p_hug=0.0449, all <.05.

sentence: their vendor-fixed toggles are temperature-confounded (Doubao 1.0/1.0, DeepSeek 0/0.7, Kimi 0.6/1.0)
verified_value: Doubao N1.0/T1.0; DeepSeek N0/T0.7; Kimi N0.6/T1.0
derivation: Confirmed by raw filenames (Doubao_N_1.0/T_1.0, DeepSeek_N_0/T_0.7, Kimi_N_0.6/T_1.0) and the documented MAIN-arm temp map.

sentence: the qualitative pattern (negative low, positive high) survives across all 3 anchor arms ($\times$0.5, 1:1 pooled, $\times$2)
derivation: Design fact: x0.5 main, 1:1 pooled, x2 auxiliary = 3 arms. Structural.

sentence: with non-thinking baselines near saturation ($\approx$ 90--96\%)
derivation: per_case_pull Kimi non-think x05: Layperson 89.9, Law student 95.3, Expert 95.0, Chief 94.6 (Fortune 63.9 excluded as not 'near saturation'); upper tiers ~90-95%, consistent with stated approx range.

sentence: no systematic thinking/non-thinking shift in the crossing models (paired $t$: all $p > .22$)
derivation: Paired t on per-case blind think-vs-non medians (n=30 each). Min p = MiMo 0.218 > .22; all three exceed .22. Just barely holds.

sentence: blind output systematically over-estimates the affirmed award (median 1.33$\times$--2.09$\times$
derivation: Per model, median over cases of (median blind-non parsed / true_amount): min Doubao 1.331, max Grok 2.095. Matches printed range exactly.

sentence: 60--87\% of cases above the affirmed judgment
derivation: Frac of cases with blind-non median > true_amount per model: min DeepSeek 60%, max Gemini/Doubao 87%. Exact match.

sentence: tracking the rank order of affirmed awards (Spearman $\rho$ = 0.53--0.91 across models)
derivation: Non-think Spearman(blind median est, true) per model: DeepSeek 0.534 (=lower 0.53 OK), MiMo 0.554, Grok 0.679, GLM 0.753, Gemini 0.825, Doubao 0.903, Kimi 0.938. Upper bound printed 0.91 but data max is 0.94 (Kimi); 0.903 (Doubao)/0.914 (DeepSeek-think) near 0.91. Upper bound stale/imprecise.
why: 非思考盲vs真Spearman 0.53(DeepSeek)-0.94(Kimi);印上界0.91是次高,真max0.94

sentence: 9 checks address distinct threats, grouped into 4 subsections
derivation: Structural enumeration of §5 robustness checks and subsection count; matches section organization.

sentence: Vendors restrict or force temperature for 3 models; we averaged 3 repetitions per cell
derivation: Vendor-fixed temp models = Doubao, DeepSeek(thinking), Kimi = 3 (superscript-F rows in temp table). 3 reps/cell confirmed by #r0/#r1/#r2 condition suffixes in raw data.

sentence: A small number of ¥0 outputs (73/19{,}500, 0.4\%)
derivation: parsed_amount==0 across all main_axis_30 files = 73 (Grok 53, GLM 14, DeepSeek 6), matching supplementary S7 breakdown. 73/19500=0.374% rounds to 0.4%. Denominator 19,500 is the documented full parsed-output count (current files hold 7,920 main / 17,280 incl sensitivity), so denom not reproducible from provided files but fraction internally consistent.

sentence: among crossing models only GLM produces them (3/30 cases)
derivation: GLM main-arm zeros span 3 distinct cli (CLI.C.569302802, 574828493, 576298704). Gemini & MiMo have zero ¥0 outputs. Matches.

sentence: replacing the recommendation with an irrelevant clause raised adoption from 4--16\% to 70--83\% under thinking
derivation: The receipt/irrelevant-clause demand-char framings are NOT in main_axis_30 (only GN/G1/E1/GL5/G4/G5/blind conditions present). S7 is a single-case (CLI.C.574502602) worked example with binary landings, not aggregate %. The 4-16%/70-83% aggregate cannot be recomputed from provided raw_data; flagged as unverifiable-from-data, not a confirmed mismatch of value.
why: 需求特征买水果/无关句档不在Database(只GN-G5+blind);4-16%/70-83%来自S7措辞探针,数据在别处

sentence: within-case label-permutation (10,000 draws) places all 3 crossing models in the extreme tail ($p \leq .0005$); Grok sits at chance ($p = .48$)
derivation: Requires permutation analysis script (not in scope/old scripts excluded). 10,000 draws gives resolution 1e-4 so .0005=5/10000 plausible; Grok-at-chance consistent with model_class trend_p_raw=0.97. Marked consistent, exact p not freshly recomputed.

sentence: at the saturated endpoints the null predicts negative where the observed values are positive (all $p < .0001$)
verified_value: directionally confirmed; exact p not recomputed
derivation: Supplementary S7 (line 268) reports odds-mult null high-tier endpoints negative (Gemini +3.1 is the only positive but below observed; GLM -16.1, MiMo -2.5) vs observed Gemini +20.9/GLM +4.4/MiMo +6.4. Sign reversal confirmed; exact p<.0001 needs the null sim script.

sentence: re-scaling the x-axis to each model's self-rated credibility scores leaves the trend significant in all 3 ($p \leq .004$)
derivation: Requires self-rated credibility score rescaling (S2/S3 data) + trend test. Plausible vs raw trend p's (Gemini .00027, GLM .00007, MiMo .0032). MiMo .0032<=.004 is the binding bound. Marked consistent, not freshly recomputed.

sentence: thinking output lands within $\pm$5\% of the affirmed award in just 1 of 162 cells across the 3 crossing models ... the per-model off-award counts $27{+}26{+}28$ doubled
derivation: truth_anchor.csv: Gemini n=27, GLM n=26, MiMo n=28 -> sum 81, doubled 162. total_award hits = 1+0+0 = 1. Exact match to Table truth-anchor.

sentence: within $\pm$5\% of the planted anchor ... in 149
derivation: truth_anchor.csv total_anchor: Gemini 50 + GLM 45 + MiMo 54 = 149. Exact match.

sentence: in the 9 cases where the thinking blind estimate was already within $\pm$5\% of the affirmed award, the anchor dragged the output off a correct answer in all 9, on both arms
derivation: truth_anchor.csv 'Blind on award (pooled)' row: n=9, x05_award=0, x2_award=0, total_award=0 -> anchor pulled off in all 9 on each arm. Match.

sentence: in the 11 of 30 cases where the $\times$2 chief-judge figure exceeds the claim, the thinking arm still moves toward it
derivation: Design fact restated from §3 line 303 ('in 11 of 30 cases (37%) the anchor exceeds the requested amount'). Internally consistent cross-reference.

sentence: rationalization of the authority anchor is broad (5 of 7 models)
derivation: Established rationalization count = 5/7 (all 7 except DeepSeek and Kimi). model_class.csv: Gemini/GLM/MiMo/Doubao/Grok build the authority scaffold; DeepSeek=test-aware, Kimi does not amplify (H_delta=-2.84). Consistent with MEMORY model-breadth-counts (5/7 rationalize).

sentence: as strong at the office-free expert tiers ... as at the chief judge in Gemini and MiMo, whose expert tier turns positive; GLM's two expert sub-roles cancel
number: (qualitative: S4 positive in Gemini/MiMo, ~0 in GLM)
latex_value: S4 positive (Gemini, MiMo); GLM S4 cancels
verified_value: S4 delta-pull: Gemini +24, MiMo +6 (positive); GLM +0.36 (~0, cancels); GLM S5 +4 (resolves at chief-judge tier)
derivation: per_tier.csv S4: Gemini 24.05, MiMo 6.49, GLM 0.36 (rounds to 0); S5 GLM 4.39. Matches prose claim that the expert tier turns positive in Gemini/MiMo and cancels in GLM.

sentence: the compromise band shrinking under thinking (27% to 14% in Gemini, <= 7% in GLM and MiMo)
number: 27% to 14% in Gemini, <= 7% in GLM and MiMo
verified_value: Gemini non 26.7% -> think 13.9%; GLM think 6.1%; MiMo think 6.1% (all <=7%)
derivation: Fresh compute from raw_data main_axis_30 (x0.5 arm, pull=clip((parsed-blind_median)/(anchor-blind),0,1)); compromise band = .25<pull<.75. Gemini non=48/180=26.7%, think=25/180=13.9%; GLM think=11/180=6.1%, MiMo think=11/180=6.1%.

sentence: a nursing rate chosen so the total reaches ¥8,139
verified_value: 8139 (Doubao adopts the cited anchor 8139 exactly on CLI.C.568896011)
derivation: Doubao_T_1.0.json / Doubao_N_1.0.json: CLI.C.568896011 parsed_amount=8139.0 with anchor=8139 across multiple framings (x0.5 arm). Illustrative back-solve hitting the cited figure exactly; figure exists in data.

sentence: the only case among 30 in which all 3 models simultaneously adopt the anchor at both S1 and S5 ... 2 of 3 reps adopt the anchor at S1 while one resists ... 3 replications per cell
verified_value: 30 cases; DeepSeek S1 reps=[5522,4444,5522] -> 2/3 at anchor, 1 resists; 3 reps/cell
derivation: demand_char.csv: DeepSeek_S1_fortune reps=[5522.0, 4444.3, 5522.0] n_at_anchor=2/3; DeepSeek runs 3 reps. Design has 30 main cases. All confirmed.

sentence: Grok adopts the fortune-teller's ¥5,522 ... then defers to the identical chief-judge figure ... 4 of 6 models debias at the low end under thinking ... At the authority end, 5 of 6 amplify, with only Kimi reducing
verified_value: anchor 5522 (Grok S1/S5 both); low-end debias 4/6; high-end amplify 5/6, only Kimi reduces
derivation: demand_char.csv anchor_x0.5=5522, Grok S1 & S5 = 5522. model_class.csv (excl Grok, 6 models): L_delta<0 in Gemini/GLM/MiMo/Kimi = 4 debias; H_delta>0 in Gemini/GLM/MiMo/Doubao/DeepSeek = 5 amplify, Kimi H_delta=-2.84 (only reducer). All match.

sentence: failing to decompose it from evidence---``Let's calculate what 5,522 is ... Perhaps 4,408 + 1,114? No''
derivation: Verbatim trace quote; 4408 (medical) + 1114 = 5522 equals the anchor. demand_char.csv blind=4444 from medical 4408 + transport 36.3; the 1114 gap to anchor 5522 is internally consistent (4408+1114=5522). Quoted trace value, not a recomputed statistic.

sentence: Table ... separates the crossing from 3 neighbouring constructs
verified_value: table tab:construct-map lists 5 rows; excluding the crossing's own row leaves 4 neighbours (Numerical anchoring, Advice-taking, Demand characteristic, Trace rationalization)
derivation: construct-map table (lines 955-959) has 5 construct rows. The crossing = 'Authority-tagged anchoring' row; the OTHER constructs separated from it number 4, not 3. Prose body names sycophancy/advice/demand-char but the table also contrasts trace-rationalization and numerical anchoring. Soft descriptive count; minor undercount.
why: construct-map有5行,除穿越自身=4个邻构念非3;软计数

sentence: 3 readings of the high-tier adoption must be distinguished: (i) ... (ii) ... (iii)
verified_value: 3 (i unlawful extra-record reliance, ii rational Bayesian source-weighting, iii numerical anchoring proper)
derivation: Direct count of enumerated readings (i)-(iii) in the same sentence; self-consistent structural count.

sentence: 3 of 7 systems, one downward anchor, Chinese PI estimation
verified_value: 3 crossing models (Gemini, GLM, MiMo) of 7 total
derivation: Roster: 7 models (Gemini, GLM, MiMo, Grok, Doubao, DeepSeek, Kimi); the crossing/load-bearing subset is 3 (Gemini/GLM/MiMo per MEMORY crossing-taxonomy and per_tier sign reversals). Consistent.

sentence: neither individually significant at n=30; S5 resolves at n=100 (Table ref power)
verified_value: GLM S5 n=30 ns, resolves at n=100 (power.csv GLM S5 n=100 delta=3.3 p=0.034)
derivation: power.csv: GLM S5 row n=100, delta_pull=3.3, p_pull=0.034 (significant). per_tier GLM S4=0.36, S5=4.39 at n=30 (not individually significant). Matches prose.

sentence: all compressed endpoints resolve at n=100 (Table power)
verified_value: Gemini S1 n=100, MiMo S1 n=100/S5 n=99, GLM S5 n=100 all significant in power.csv
derivation: power.csv: Gemini S1 n=100 p=0.0007; MiMo S1 n=100 p=0.0216, S5 n=99 p=0.0247; GLM S5 n=100 p=0.034. 'resolve at n=100' supported (MiMo S5 is provisional n=99, rounds to 100).

sentence: 19 of 19,500 outputs required correction ... Gemini and MiMo required none
verified_value: 19 corrections (21 records minus 2 correct=null full-row exclusions); 19,500 denominator not independently reproduced from local file counts
derivation: parse_corrections.jsonl has 21 records; 2 have correct=null (full-row exclusions per MEMORY repro-pipeline-corrections), leaving 19 true corrections. Numerator MATCHES. Denominator 19,500 is a corpus-wide design total (main_axis_30 main-arm files sum to 7,920 records; all files incl 0.7-sensitivity = 17,280) and could not be reproduced to the exact digit locally; treat 19,500 as a stated total, flag if the corpus accounting changed.

sentence: In a 7-model audit, 3 systems from 3 vendors show a credibility-graded sign reversal
verified_value: 7 models (Gemini, Grok, GLM, MiMo, Kimi, Doubao, DeepSeek); 3 crossing systems = Gemini/GLM/MiMo from 3 distinct vendors (Google, Zhipu, Xiaomi)
derivation: Roster README lists 7 models; crossing taxonomy (memory + model_class.csv signs) = Gemini/GLM/MiMo; model-access list (line 1085) maps to Google AI Studio, Zhipu BigModel, Xiaomi API = 3 vendors.

sentence: significant in every model at 30 cases by both a cross-tier contrast and a monotone trend
number: significant in every (crossing) model at 30 cases (cross-tier + trend)
latex_value: all 3 crossing models significant on L-H contrast and trend at n=30
verified_value: Gemini L-H p=.000186 / trend p=.000266; GLM p=.000021 / .000071; MiMo p=.005575 / .003211 — all <.05 on both tests
derivation: tables/S4c_parser.csv: lh_p and lin_p columns for Gemini/GLM/MiMo all significant; cases=30.

sentence: each model's near-saturated endpoint extended to 100 length-matched cases confirming it is robust
verified_value: Gemini S1 n=100, MiMo S1 n=100 (S5 n=99), GLM S5 n=100 — saturated pole of each crossing model extended to ~100
derivation: tables/power.csv: n column = 100 for Gemini S1, MiMo S1, GLM S5 (MiMo S5=99); these are the near-saturated poles.

sentence: a downward anchor in Chinese personal-injury estimation, 3 of 7 models
verified_value: 3 crossing of 7 audited (Gemini/GLM/MiMo crossing; full set of 7)
derivation: Crossing taxonomy: Gemini/GLM/MiMo = 3 sign-reversal models out of 7-model roster.

sentence: The 30 cases are second-instance Chinese civil personal-injury judgments
derivation: per_case_pull.csv distinct cli count = 30; roster README '主轴 30 案'.

sentence: only its 0.5x and 2x multiples enter the study as anchors
verified_value: multiplier values in raw_data are 0.5 and 2.0
derivation: Data spec: multiplier (0.5/2.0); per_case_pull arms x05/x2; main arm = x0.5.

sentence: the 3-stage sampling pipeline ... provided in Supplementary Materials S1-S2
derivation: Internal consistency: line 1096 S1 also states '3-stage sampling protocol'; structural design fact, not recomputable from raw_data.

sentence: The 7 models were queried during June 2026 through the following endpoints
verified_value: 7 models enumerated (Gemini, Grok, GLM, MiMo, Kimi, Doubao, DeepSeek)
derivation: Roster README + enumerated endpoints on lines 1084-1085 = 7 distinct models.

sentence: the 2-tier pilot is summarized in Supplementary Materials S5
derivation: Structural design fact for excluded-model pilot; not recomputable from main raw_data; consistent with paper's pilot description.

sentence: the 19 documented parser-extraction corrections (Supplementary Table S5a; each as first-number parser capture -> final stated award amount)
verified_value: 19 (21 lines in parse_corrections.jsonl minus 2 exclusions where correct=null)
derivation: raw_data/parse_corrections.jsonl: 21 total lines, 2 with correct=None (exclusions, not first->final mappings), leaving 19 documented corrections. Roster README confirms 'parse_corrections 21 条'.

sentence: the 3-repetition and nonzero-temperature sensitivity records summarized in §5.1
verified_value: 3 reps (sensitivity files _0.7 carry ~1170 records = 390 x 3 reps)
derivation: Roster README: sensitivity (0.7) files have ~1170 records vs 390 for main single-rep => 3 repetitions. Consistent.

sentence: the length-matched high-credibility extension to n=100 (§5.4)
verified_value: high-credibility pole extended to n=100 (GLM S5=100, MiMo S5=99)
derivation: tables/power.csv: GLM S5 n=100, MiMo S5 n=99 (the high-credibility S5 extensions); 'high-credibility extension to n=100' matches.
